positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with their session established
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify the user's name or account identifier is visible on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and user remains authenticated on the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page content is still displayed
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and verify session persistence on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Email format is accepted without validation errors, password is masked, and login succeeds
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page loads successfully with all UI elements visible (logo, username field, password field, login button)
Click on the email/username input field
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Verify no inline validation error appears for the email field
Click on the password input field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify the password is masked/hidden as asterisks or dots
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify successful login and redirection to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Login page fields accept valid email format in username

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and protected pages are no longer accessible
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Locate and click the Logout/Sign Out button or menu option
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that navigating back to the dashboard URL redirects to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User can navigate the login form using keyboard and submit using the Enter key, resulting in successful authentication
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Click on the email/username field and enter 'testd1051@gmail.com'
Press the Tab key to move focus to the password field
Verify the password field is now focused
Enter the valid password in the password field
Press the Enter key to submit the form
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Verify successful login without clicking the Login button
positive_scenarios.title: Login using keyboard navigation and Enter key submission

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Authenticated users are automatically redirected from the login page to the dashboard, preventing redundant login
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Manually navigate back to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login in the browser address bar
Verify the application redirects the already-authenticated user away from the login page
Verify the dashboard/home page is displayed instead
positive_scenarios.title: Login page redirects authenticated user away from login URL

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields and login is prevented
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the email/username field blank
Leave the password field blank
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed indicating that username/email is required
Verify an error message is displayed indicating that password is required
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected with a generic error message; no authentication occurs and no sensitive data is exposed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter an incorrect password 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password'
Verify the password field is cleared or remains for re-entry
Verify no sensitive information (e.g., correct password hint) is exposed in the error message
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username but incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected with a generic error message that does not reveal whether the username exists in the system
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'nonexistentuser_xyz@fakeemail.com' in the email/username field
Enter any password 'SomePassword123!' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found'
Verify the error message does not distinguish between wrong username and wrong password (to prevent user enumeration)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with non-existent username

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error is shown for the empty password field and login is not attempted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field completely blank
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed indicating that the password field is required
Verify no authentication request is made to the server (check network tab if possible)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Client-side or server-side validation rejects the malformed email format and displays an appropriate error message
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'invalidemail@@nodomain' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed indicating invalid email format such as 'Please enter a valid email address'
Verify the form is not submitted with an improperly formatted email
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Application safely handles SQL injection input, rejects the login attempt, and does not expose any system or database information
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter the SQL injection string \"' OR '1'='1'; --\" in the email/username field
Enter any password 'AnyPassword123' in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Invalid email format'
Verify the application does not crash or expose database error details
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Application gracefully handles oversized input, rejects the login, and remains stable without crashing
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 500 characters (e.g., 'aaaaaa...@test.com' padded to 500 chars) in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed such as 'Input too long' or 'Invalid credentials'
Verify the application does not crash or return a server error (500)
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with extremely long username exceeding character limit

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Validation error is shown for the empty username field and login is not attempted
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field completely blank
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the Login/Submit button
Verify the user is NOT redirected away from the login page
Verify an error message is displayed indicating that the username/email field is required
Verify the password field retains its value or is cleared appropriately
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username only
